name: WGD 2038−4008
tags_zh: 类星体; 四重像; 时间延迟; TDCOSMO/STRIDES; 环境
summary: A quadruply imaged quasar used in recent time-delay cosmography and lens-environment studies. Suitable for collecting imaging, spectroscopy, time-delay, LOS, and lens-modelling references.
summary_zh: 四重成像类星体，常用于时间延迟宇宙学和透镜环境研究。适合作为汇总成像、光谱、时延、视线结构和透镜建模文献的数据条目。

name: DES J0408−5354
tags_zh: 类星体; 四重像; 时间延迟; STRIDES; DES
summary: A STRIDES/DES lensed quasar with time-delay and environment analyses. Useful as a data-card template for systems with both imaging and monitoring data.
summary_zh: DES/STRIDES 发现并研究的四重成像类星体，已有时延和环境分析。适合展示同时具有成像、监测和视线环境信息的系统。

name: HE 0435−1223
tags_zh: 类星体; 四重像; 时间延迟; H0LiCOW; TDCOSMO
summary: A classic H0LiCOW/TDCOSMO system with extensive imaging, time-delay, lens-modelling, kinematics, and LOS analyses.
summary_zh: 经典 H0LiCOW/TDCOSMO 系统，具有丰富的成像、时延、透镜建模、运动学和视线结构研究。

name: RXJ1131−1231
tags_zh: 类星体; 四重像; 时间延迟; 微透镜; H0LiCOW
summary: A widely used time-delay lens with strong lensing, stellar kinematics, and accretion-disc microlensing studies.
summary_zh: 常用于时间延迟宇宙学的四重成像类星体，同时也是吸积盘微引力透镜研究中的重要样本。

name: PG 1115+080
scale_zh: 星系尺度 / 星系群环境
tags_zh: 类星体; 四重像; 时间延迟; 经典透镜
summary: One of the early classic quadruply imaged quasars; often used in lens-modelling, time-delay, and group-environment discussions.
summary_zh: 早期发现的经典四重成像类星体，经常用于透镜建模、时间延迟和星系群环境讨论。

name: WFI 2033−4723
tags_zh: 类星体; 四重像; 时间延迟; H0LiCOW; TDCOSMO
summary: A time-delay cosmography system in the H0LiCOW/TDCOSMO sample with deep imaging and lens-environment constraints.
summary_zh: H0LiCOW/TDCOSMO 样本中的时间延迟透镜系统，具有深度成像和透镜环境约束。

name: B1608+656
tags: QSO/radio source; quad; time-delay; classic lens
tags_zh: 类星体/射电源; 四重像; 时间延迟; 经典透镜
summary: A well-known radio time-delay lens used in early precision time-delay cosmography and mass-modelling work.
summary_zh: 著名的射电时间延迟透镜系统，曾用于早期高精度时间延迟宇宙学和质量建模研究。

name: Q0957+561
tags_zh: 类星体; 双重像; 时间延迟; 经典透镜
summary: The first discovered gravitationally lensed quasar, historically important for time-delay measurements and lens-environment studies.
summary_zh: 首个被发现的引力透镜类星体，在时间延迟测量和透镜环境研究中具有重要历史意义。

name: SN Refsdal
tags: SN; cluster lens; time-delay; HST; Refsdal
tags_zh: 超新星; 星系团透镜; 时间延迟; HST; Refsdal
summary: The first spatially resolved multiply imaged supernova. It is a reference case for cluster lens modelling, time-delay prediction, and cosmographic inference with lensed SNe.
summary_zh: 首个空间分辨的多重成像超新星，是星系团透镜建模、时延预测和透镜超新星宇宙学研究的代表性系统。

name: iPTF16geu / SN 2016geu
tags: SN Ia; galaxy lens; quad; microlensing; standard candle
tags_zh: Ia 型超新星; 星系尺度透镜; 四重像; 微透镜; 标准烛光
summary: A resolved, strongly lensed Type Ia supernova. It is a compact galaxy-scale system useful for collecting light curves, spectroscopy, lens modelling, microlensing, and dust-extinction studies.
summary_zh: 空间分辨的强透镜 Ia 型超新星，适合汇总光变曲线、光谱、透镜建模、微透镜和尘埃消光研究。

name: SN Zwicky / SN 2022qmx
tags: SN Ia; ZTF; quad; galaxy lens; LensWatch
tags_zh: Ia 型超新星; ZTF; 四重像; 星系尺度透镜; LensWatch
summary: A galaxy-scale strongly lensed Type Ia supernova discovered in unresolved ZTF data and later resolved with high-resolution imaging.
summary_zh: 由 ZTF 非分辨数据发现、随后通过高分辨率成像分辨的星系尺度强透镜 Ia 型超新星。

name: SN H0pe
tags: SN Ia; JWST; cluster lens; time-delay; H0
tags_zh: Ia 型超新星; JWST; 星系团透镜; 时间延迟; H0
summary: A triply imaged Type Ia supernova discovered with JWST/NIRCam in a cluster field, used for time-delay, magnification, and H0 inference.
summary_zh: JWST/NIRCam 在星系团场中发现的三重成像 Ia 型超新星，可用于时延、放大率和 H0 推断研究。
